name: buaa-thesis-checker
description: BUAA thesis checking and document translation skills for Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: BUAA thesis format checking, content review, and Chinese-to-English translation.
interface.longDescription: Claude Code plugin for BUAA thesis comprehensive review: format checking with 14 automated checks, content audit with LLM analysis, academic review comments generation, and Markdown/HTML report delivery.
defaultPrompt: $buaa-thesis-format-checking Check the format of this thesis PDF
$buaa-thesis-checking Generate a comprehensive review for this thesis
